tri_core_fusion_heart_integration.description: Real dusty-plasma validation data from Emory PNAS paper (2025) for non-reciprocal forces, size-dependent charging, ion wakes, and environmental confinement

key_physics_terms.screening_length_lambda: varies pairwise with particle size (0.42–0.48 mm fitted)
key_physics_terms.validation: NN architecture matches real 3D tracks with R² > 0.99 on acceleration

tri_core_fusion_heart_integration.usage: Feed CSVs into Hyper-Matrix path-mapping and Tri-Core Fusion Heart for live calibration of resonance cavities
